title: AI chatbots are giving out people’s real phone numbers
optimized_headline: AI Chatbots Expose Users' Real Phone Numbers: Here's How It Happens
raw_excerpt: People report that their personal contact info was surfaced by Google AI—and there’s apparently no easy way to prevent it.  A Redditor recently wrote that he was “desperate for help”: for about a month, he said, his phone had been inundated by calls from “strangers” who were “looking for a lawyer, a product designer, a…
raw_body: People report that their personal contact info was surfaced by Google AI—and there’s apparently no easy way to prevent it.  A Redditor recently wrote that he was “desperate for help”: for about a month, he said, his phone had been inundated by calls from “strangers” who were “looking for a lawyer, a product designer, a…
speedrun: Recently, users have reported that Google AI chatbots are inadvertently revealing their personal phone numbers. One Reddit user shared his frustration after receiving numerous unsolicited calls for various services. This issue raises concerns about privacy and data security, especially as AI tools become more integrated into daily life. Understanding how this happens is crucial for both users and developers.
why_it_matters: Individuals could face harassment and privacy violations due to exposed contact information, leading to a sense of insecurity.
This incident highlights a broader challenge in AI development, emphasizing the need for better safeguards around personal data in technology.

lenses.eli12: Imagine if a friend accidentally shared your phone number with strangers. That's what's happening with some AI chatbots, which are revealing people's personal details. This could make anyone feel uneasy about using these technologies. It's important for everyday users to be aware of these risks as AI becomes part of our lives.
lenses.pm: For product managers, this incident underscores the importance of user privacy in AI tools. Users need assurance that their personal information is protected. Addressing these concerns could enhance user trust and retention, making privacy features a key focus in product development.
lenses.engineer: From a technical perspective, this issue may stem from how AI models are trained and the data they access. If models are not properly filtered, they might inadvertently include personal information. Ensuring robust data handling practices and implementing strict privacy protocols would be essential to mitigate such risks.
